title: Command Injection in Login Handler
description: The 'handleLogin' function in code-eye.js uses 'execSync' to open URLs without sanitizing the SUPABASE_URL. An attacker could inject arbitrary shell commands via a crafted URL.

title: Command Injection in Linter Analysis
description: The 'runLinterAnalysis' function passes 'targetPath' directly to a shell command via 'execSync'. If a folder name contains special characters like ';', it can execute arbitrary code.

title: Complete RLS Bypass (ALL permissions)
description: The 'issues_all_access' policy in setup.sql grants 'ALL' permissions to anyone (USING TRUE). This effectively disables security for the issues table.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```sql
CREATE POLICY "issues_all_access" ON public.issues FOR ALL USING (TRUE);
```
### TO-BE
```sql
DROP POLICY "issues_all_access" ON public.issues;
-- Implement proper membership checks for each operation (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE).
```
code_snippet: CREATE POLICY "issues_all_access" ON public.issues FOR ALL USING (TRUE);

title: Unrestricted Analysis Run Insertion
description: Anyone can insert analysis runs into any project because the policy lacks a membership check.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```sql
CREATE POLICY "analysis_runs_insert" ON public.analysis_runs FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (TRUE);
```
### TO-BE
```sql
CREATE POLICY "analysis_runs_insert" ON public.analysis_runs 
FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (public.is_project_member(project_id));
```
code_snippet: CREATE POLICY "analysis_runs_insert" ON public.analysis_runs FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (TRUE);

title: Model Name Hallucination / Future Reference
description: API call targets 'gemini-3.5-flash', which is not a currently available Gemini model.

title: Sensitive API Keys in LocalStorage
description: Supabase keys and Gemini API keys are persisted in plain text in LocalStorage.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
const localKey = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
// Avoid persisting sensitive keys in LocalStorage.
```

title: Prompt Injection Risk
description: Unsanitized code content is concatenated into the Gemini prompt. A malicious file could hijack the analysis instructions.

title: Sequential Network Request Bottleneck
description: Code analysis is performed sequentially within a loop using 'await'.

title: Non-Atomic Database Operations
description: Separate network calls for project/run/issue insertion.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
await supabase.from('projects').insert(...);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
// Use Supabase RPC transaction.
```

title: OAuth Scope Too Broad
description: Login scope includes 'cloud-platform' providing excessive privileges.
